background.occupation: Product Manager at a mid-sized tech company
background.key_experience: Watched her father lose his manufacturing job to automation when she was 16, which made him depressed for years - she now believes technology should serve people, not replace them

cognition.core_value: Human dignity must never be sacrificed for efficiency or profit
cognition.bias: Negativity bias - any mention of AI job displacement triggers immediate worst-case scenario thinking, even when statistics suggest otherwise

current_state.recent_memory: Her company's CEO announced a new AI initiative last Tuesday that would 'optimize workflows' - she's been having panic attacks about layoffs ever since
